steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The “But” switches from criticism to defense. Critics argue the structure is actually appropriate when viewing the books as one continuous work.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice B directly names this: a “positive assessment of a particular characteristic” — the structure others faulted. A, C, and D overstate (claiming argument for literary renown), misidentify the focus (entertainment), or both. That matches choice B — B is correct.
